title: Evangelion vs Blue gender 3
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion vs. Blue gender <3             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Jul 06, 2006 12:26 pm After giving Blue gender and Evangelion another run i realized that they are very similar with the plot and at times evenwith the charcters. Does anyone else agree with me?

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Thu Jul 06, 2006 3:45 pm What's blue gender? Should I watch it?

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Thu Jul 06, 2006 3:54 pm ZeroFive1 wrote: What's blue gender? Should I watch it?

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu Jul 06, 2006 8:47 pm It was ok but not really worth my time, evas much better.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Fri Jul 07, 2006 12:44 pm I personally think that Blue Gender was a very good series. Eva is much better but still, the overall concept of Blue Gender seems more realistic to me than Eva. I mean I watch Blue Gender and I say "wow, that really could become out world" its much more realistic. Also theres more romance involved. I love the animation and the deaths in Blue Gender were beautifully animated and done just right. there is also more storyline than eva (not to say eva isn't good, it is my second fav anime to yyh). there was also better character development in blue gender than in eva.

[]:             Quote Post by xiuxiu » Sat Jul 08, 2006 4:13 am i can't really say i'm too keen on blue gender. i've only watched a few episodes though.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sat Jul 08, 2006 12:47 pm there was also better character development in blue gender than in eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sat Jul 08, 2006 4:00 pm Everyone should watch it!

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Sun Jul 09, 2006 3:43 pm Um....[Dr.Evil]How about noooooo Scott![/Dr.Evil] Blue Gender? That series with people in gears or something shooting giant man eating bugs that killed off most of the human race that turns out was created by the very people who lead the last human resistance and everybody also dies in the end? Never saw it.... But seriously, I can't see it........

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Tue Jul 11, 2006 2:48 pm thats not true there are still many people left alive on Earth, second earth gets blown to bits!!!! (Die seno Miyagi) Sides its a good anime

[]:             Quote Post by Light of the Dawn » Sun Jul 16, 2006 7:07 am Blue Gender wasn't really like NGE... Rahxephon and NGE are more similar.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sun Jul 16, 2006 6:04 pm Light of the Dawn wrote: Blue Gender wasn't really like NGE... Rahxephon and NGE are more similar.
